summary: Completed frontend testing of StatMoose school management feature enhancements. All 7 features verified working correctly: game note field, player class dropdown, 12-hour time format, stat tracking modes, clock toggle, timeout presets, and text visibility.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_18
context_for_next_testing_agent: All school management enhancements verified working. Game scheduling dialog has note field, player roster has class dropdown (FR/SO/JR/SR/GR), times display in 12-hour format, game start dialog has full options (stat modes, clock, timeouts).

game_note_field.details: Game Note (optional) field visible with placeholder 'e.g., Homecoming game, District playoff'

player_class_dropdown.details: Class dropdown shows all 5 options: Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior, Graduate

12_hour_time_format.details: Times display as '10:00 PM', '7:00 PM' format using formatTime12Hour helper

stat_tracking_modes.details: Three modes visible: Simple (Basic Stats), Classic (Full Stats), Advanced (Pro Interface)

clock_toggle.details: Game Clock toggle with switch, period minutes selector, period type selector

timeout_presets.details: Three presets: HS (5), College (4), Custom with number selector

text_visibility.details: Text color rgb(255,255,255) on bg rgb(15,23,42) - excellent white on dark slate contrast

screenshots: .screenshots/game_start_dialog.png - Game start dialog with all options
.screenshots/game_schedule_dialog.png - Game scheduling dialog with note field
